ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population change record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population for the year */,
  "population_change" INTEGER /* Change in population compared to the previous year */,
  "q1_population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the first quarter of the year */,
  "q2_population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the second quarter of the year */,
  "q3_population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the third quarter of the year */,
  "q4_population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the fourth quarter of the year */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population for the year */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population for the year */,
  "net_migration" INTEGER /* Net migration for the year */,
  "internal_migration" INTEGER /* Internal migration for the year */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate for the year */,
  "job_creation_rate" REAL /* Job creation rate for the year */,
  "health_outcomes" TEXT /* Health outcomes for the year */,
  "healthcare_access" TEXT /* Healthcare access for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_statistics" (
  "ethnic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic statistic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "ancestry" TEXT /* Ancestry or ethnic group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the city's population with this ancestry */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the ethnic group */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the ethnic group */,
  "secondary_language" TEXT /* Secondary language spoken by the ethnic group */,
  "religious_affiliation" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the ethnic group */,
  "cultural_events" INTEGER /* Number of cultural events organized by the ethnic group */,
  "community_organizations" INTEGER /* Number of community organizations or associations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each population change record
Reference to the city
Year of the population estimate
Estimated population for the year

Population estimate for the first quarter of the year
